paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: **mBART02** introduces denoising pre-training for multilingual sequence-to-sequence models, masking spans of input sequences rather than individual tokens, enabling robust multilingual representation learning. It is the second variant in the mBART series, expanding upon mBART01 with improved generalization across languages.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CCNet (Common Crawl) multilingual corpus with 25 languages (CC25)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual machine translation, unsupervised machine translation, document-level translation, cross-lingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multilingual machine translation, unsupervised machine translation, and improving generalization to low-resource languages
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for machine translation, unsupervised machine translation via back-translation and language transfer
raw_extraction.extension: Span-masking denoising objective enables better handling of long-range dependencies and improves robustness to noise in multilingual contexts.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: **mBART06** is a variant of mBART trained exclusively on six major European languages (English, Romanian, Czech, Italian, French, Spanish), demonstrating controlled pre-training to study language generalization effects.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CCNet (Common Crawl) multilingual corpus with 6 languages (CC6)
raw_extraction.application: Cross-lingual transfer learning, unsupervised machine translation, evaluating generalization to unseen languages
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating multilingual pre-training generalization across languages
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for machine translation, unsupervised machine translation via back-translation and language transfer
raw_extraction.extension: Controlled pre-training on a subset of languages (CC6) allows isolation of language-specific versus universal representation learning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: **mBART25** represents the largest scale variant of the mBART series, trained on 25 languages with extensive denoising pre-training. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on multilingual machine translation and excels in zero-shot and few-shot scenarios due to its comprehensive multilingual exposure.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CCNet (Common Crawl) multilingual corpus with 25 languages (CC25)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual machine translation, unsupervised machine translation, document-level translation, cross-lingual transfer learning, zero-shot translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable multilingual machine translation, zero-shot and few-shot cross-lingual transfer
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for machine translation, unsupervised machine translation via back-translation and language transfer
raw_extraction.extension: Full 25-language pre-training enables superior zero-shot and few-shot transfer capabilities compared to smaller mBART variants.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **multilingual denoising pre-training** for sequence-to-sequence models, combining masked language modeling and corrupted input reconstruction across multiple languages.
raw_extraction.application: Neural machine translation (NMT), multilingual text generation, document-level translation, and cross-lingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unsupervised/multilingual machine translation, improving performance on low-resource languages through multilingual pre-training
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for machine translation and document-level translation tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: **mBART25** introduces denoising pre-training for multilingual sequence-to-sequence models, specifically designed for document-level machine translation (DOC-MT) using a **masked span denoising objective**. Unlike prior work, it leverages document-level coherence by masking entire spans of text rather than single tokens.
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual machine translation (document-level and sentence-level), cross-lingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving multilingual neural machine translation quality by leveraging document-level context and denoising objectives
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for document-level machine translation (DOC-MT) and sentence-level machine translation (Sent-MT)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Baseline model using **random noise injection** for comparison against denoising pre-training, demonstrating the importance of structured denoising objectives for translation quality.
raw_extraction.application: Controlled experiments for comparing denoising techniques in MT
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the impact of denoising strategies on multilingual machine translation performance
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces multilingual denoising pre-training using a sequence-to-sequence Transformer architecture with masked span corruption, enabling robust cross-lingual transfer learning.
raw_extraction.application: Neural machine translation, multilingual text generation, cross-lingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.license: null (not explicitly stated in provided content)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Cross-lingual natural language processing, particularly neural machine translation and multilingual text generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of mBART-50 with larger capacity for improved performance across low-resource languages.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl, WMT corpora, OPUS, United Nations Parallel Corpus, Europarl, TED Talks, OpenSubtitles, CC-Aligned, WikiMatrix, ParaCrawl
raw_extraction.application: Neural machine translation, multilingual text generation, cross-lingual transfer learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Cross-lingual natural language processing, particularly neural machine translation and multilingual text generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
